abilities.name: water-absorb
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Water-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it. Water moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute.
abilities.flavorText: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: strong-jaw
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
abilities.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.

abilities.name: sand-rush
abilities.shortEffect: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during a sandstorm, and it does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in a sandstorm.
